data.name: Lust Bunker [18+]
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to "Lust Bunker" – an enthralling adult visual novel that will immerse you in an underground world where intrigue, choices, and passion shape your destiny.

🔥 Step into this extraordinary bunker where the protagonist must survive alongside other residents, solve tasks, and provide assistance to ensure the community's well-being. Everything was in order until an alarm sounded, warning of danger in closed sector #666.

💋 Alter the course of events as the hero ventures into "closed sector #666." There, behind mysterious doors, he encounters two enigmatic girls who are desperately seeking refuge. Can he ensure their safety and find a way out of this challenging situation?

🍽️ However, this dramatic tale doesn't come without a pressing question – will there be enough food for everyone? The choices you make will impact the community, character relationships, and the progression of the main game plot.

🔞 "Lust Bunker" also features adult content, adding unpredictability and emotional delight to the game. You play not just for survival but to unravel your own and your cohabitants' stories.

Dive into the world of "Lust Bunker" and make crucial decisions that will shape your fate and that of your characters. Survival, intrigue, and unforgettable moments await you in this erotic narrative. Are you up for the challenge?

Features:
  • An immersive storyline filled with emotional twists and moments that will make your heart race.
  • A Multitude of Sexy Situations
  • Thrilling gameplay from start to finish
  • Explicit content and mature themes, suitable only for players 18 years and older
  • Plenty of lewd scenes with various girls
  • Ability to play with one hand. ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

data.short_description: Welcome to "Lust Bunker" – an enthralling adult visual novel that will immerse you in an underground world where intrigue, choices, and passion shape your destiny.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
